login.title: Tekua
login.subtitle: Sign in to access governance services.
login.onlyMembers: Only registered members can access this portal.
login.errorDefault: An error occurred during sign in. Check your credentials.

security_tab.passwordDescription: We recommend using a strong password that you don't use on other sites.

admin.title: User Management
admin.subtitle: View and manage association members and their permissions.
admin.updateRoleError: Error updating role. Check if Edge Function is configured.

home.title: Tekua Governance Portal
home.subtitle: Welcome to the central association services system. Here you can manage your account, access documents and participate in decisions.
home.cardMembrosDesc: View and manage the complete list of association members and their data.
home.cardGovDesc: Access voting tools, meeting minutes and official documents.
home.cardDocDesc: Read the Tekua association statutes and guidelines.

auth.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email before logging in.
auth.rate_limit_exceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.
auth.invalid_session: Invalid or expired session. Please request a new link.

forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.resetSubtitle: Choose a strong password for your account.
forgotPassword.resetSuccess: Password updated successfully! You can sign in now.
forgotPassword.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters long.
